sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n56308" key="kaxrudia/zomai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καχρῠδιάζομαι</orth>, <sense id="n56308.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sprout in winter</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ὁ σπόρος -άσεται</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8(4).251</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
